Wendy G Photography is a professional wedding photographer based in Brooklyn, New York. Specializing in capturing authentic, emotional moments, Wendy G Photography brings a unique artistic vision to every wedding. With 108 glowing reviews and a passion for storytelling, every image reflects the love and joy of your special day.
